LanguageData.VBE_CommunityDoctor.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] fungierte als primärer Gesundheitsdienstleister der Gemeinde und behandelte alles von kleinen Schnittwunden bis hin zu schweren Krankheiten. Während [PAWN_pronoun] ein Experte für medizinische Praktiken war, hatte [PAWN_pronoun] wenig Geduld mit dem Verhandeln oder dem Umgang mit Tieren und konzentrierte sich lieber auf das Wohlergehen der [PAWN_possessive] Patienten.
LanguageData.VBE_CommunityDoctor.title: Gemeinschaftsarzt
LanguageData.VBE_CorporateFinancier.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] navigierte durch die komplexe Welt der Unternehmensfinanzierung und verwaltete Investitionen und Finanzstrategien für einen großen Raumfahrtkonzern. [PAWN_possessive] Der scharfe Verstand für Zahlen ließ sich nicht gut auf die physischen Anforderungen des Kolonielebens oder die Nuancen der persönlichen Interaktion übertragen.
LanguageData.VBE_CorporateFinancier.title: Unternehmensfinanzierer
LanguageData.VBE_EngineHelper.baseDesc: Schon als Kind war [PAWN_pronoun] vom Maschinenraum des Schiffes besessen. Unter den wachsamen Augen der Ingenieure lernte [PAWN_pronoun], wie man die Motoren wartet und repariert, die ihre Welt am Leben hielten. Dieser frühe Start verschaffte [PAWN_objective] einen guten Vorsprung in den mechanischen Fähigkeiten, bedeutete jedoch, dass [PAWN_pronoun] oft zu beschäftigt war, um Freunde zu finden oder andere Fächer zu studieren.
LanguageData.VBE_EngineHelper.title: Motorhelfer
LanguageData.VBE_EngineRoomTech.baseDesc: Als Techniker im Maschinenraum hielt [PAWN_nameDef] das Herz des Raumschiffs am Laufen. [PAWN_pronoun] konnte mit den richtigen Werkzeugen fast alles reparieren, aber [PAWN_pronoun] mangelte es an Feingefühl in sozialen Interaktionen und er vermied alle Aufgaben, die eine sanfte Berührung erforderten.
LanguageData.VBE_EngineRoomTech.title: Maschinenraumtechnik
LanguageData.VBE_FieldTechnician.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] arbeitete als Außendiensttechniker und wartete und reparierte Geräte an abgelegenen Standorten. [PAWN_pronoun] war geschickt darin, komplexe technische Probleme zu lösen, und bevorzugte die Gesellschaft von Maschinen gegenüber Menschen, was zu [PAWN_possessive] unterentwickelten sozialen Fähigkeiten führte.
LanguageData.VBE_FieldTechnician.title: Außendiensttechniker
LanguageData.VBE_GalacticMedic.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] diente als Sanitäter auf einem Raumschiff und behandelte alles von Weltraumkrankheit bis hin zu Verletzungen durch Asteroideneinschläge. [PAWN_possessive] Kenntnisse der Medizin waren beispiellos, aber [PAWN_pronoun] hatte keinen Sinn für Forschung oder komplexe Theorien.
LanguageData.VBE_GalacticMedic.title: Galaktischer Sanitäter
LanguageData.VBE_GalleyChef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] leitete die Kombüse auf einem mittelgroßen Raumschiff und versorgte die Besatzung mit herzhaften und nahrhaften Mahlzeiten. Das Kochen in der Schwerelosigkeit stellte einzigartige Herausforderungen dar, doch [PAWN_pronoun] beherrschte die Kunst. Allerdings kam [PAWN_pronoun] nie gut mit der Mechanik des Schiffes zurecht und bevorzugte Schwenks gegenüber Plasmamotoren.
LanguageData.VBE_GalleyChef.title: Küchenchef
LanguageData.VBE_GardenCurator.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] leitete einen großen botanischen Garten, der sich auf den Anbau seltener Pflanzen und die Aufklärung der Öffentlichkeit spezialisierte. Der grüne Daumen von [PAWN_possessive] war beispiellos, doch [PAWN_pronoun] fehlten die körperlichen Fähigkeiten für anspruchsvolle Arbeit oder den Kampf.
LanguageData.VBE_GardenCurator.title: Gartenkurator
LanguageData.VBE_HerbalKin.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde vom Kräuterheiler des Stammes großgezogen und lernte die Eigenschaften jeder Pflanze kennen und lernte, wie man sie zur Heilung von Krankheiten einsetzt. Durch diese frühe Auseinandersetzung mit der Naturheilkunde beherrschte [PAWN_pronoun] die Heilpraktiken, obwohl sich [PAWN_pronoun] nie mit den gewalttätigeren Aspekten des Stammeslebens wie der Jagd oder der Verteidigung des Stammes beschäftigte.
LanguageData.VBE_HerbalKin.title: Kräuterverwandte
LanguageData.VBE_JungleScout.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde in einen Stamm hineingeboren, der im dichten Dschungel seiner Heimatwelt lebte. Schon in jungen Jahren lernte [PAWN_pronoun], sich lautlos durch das Unterholz zu bewegen und die unzähligen Pflanzen und Tiere zu identifizieren. Während [PAWN_pronoun] sich mit dem Aufspüren und der Nahrungssuche auskennt, bleibt [PAWN_pronoun] aufgrund der Isolation von fortschrittlicher Technologie wenig Verständnis für die Außenwelt.
LanguageData.VBE_JungleScout.title: Dschungel-Scout
LanguageData.VBE_MilitiaRecruit.baseDesc: In einem von Konflikten zerrissenen Land wurde [PAWN_nameDef] schon in jungen Jahren in eine örtliche Miliz rekrutiert. [PAWN_pronoun] lernte die harten Realitäten des Krieges kennen und beherrschte Waffen und Taktiken. Doch der Fokus auf Überleben und Kampf hinterließ [PAWN_pronoun] Lücken in der [PAWN_possessive] formalen Bildung und eine misstrauische Haltung gegenüber Fremden.
LanguageData.VBE_MilitiaRecruit.title: Milizrekrut
LanguageData.VBE_RefugeeRunner.baseDesc: Die Flucht aus Konfliktgebieten war ein fester Bestandteil der Kindheit von [PAWN_nameDef]. [PAWN_pronoun] hat gelernt, sich in gefährlich Landschaften zurechtzufinden und vor allem seinen [PAWN_possessive] Instinkten zu vertrauen. Diese erschütternden Erfahrungen verbesserten [PAWN_possessive] Überlebensfähigkeiten, ließen aber wenig Raum für Bildung oder soziale Feinheiten.
LanguageData.VBE_RefugeeRunner.title: Flüchtlingsläufer
LanguageData.VBE_RetiredSoldier.baseDesc: Nach Jahren des Militärdienstes zog sich [PAWN_nameDef] auf der Suche nach Frieden in die Kolonie zurück. Trotz [PAWN_possessive] Integrationsbemühungen hatte [PAWN_pronoun] Schwierigkeiten mit gewaltfreien Aufgaben und fand Trost nur in Routine und körperlicher Arbeit. [PAWN_possessive] Erfahrung machte [PAWN_objective] zu einem wertvollen Aktivposten in Konflikten, aber [PAWN_pronoun] passte sich nie ganz an das zivile Leben an.
LanguageData.VBE_RetiredSoldier.title: saltier im Ruhestand
LanguageData.VBE_ShipsNavigator.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] kartierte die Sterne als Hauptnavigator an Bord eines Raumschiffs. [PAWN_pronoun] hatte eine unheimliche Fähigkeit, die sichersten und schnellsten Routen durch den Kosmos zu finden, obwohl [PAWN_pronoun] mit mechanischen Aufgaben zu kämpfen hatte und diese oft anderen überließ.
LanguageData.VBE_ShipsNavigator.title: Schiffsnavigator
LanguageData.VBE_StarshipScamp.baseDesc: Als Kind, das an Bord des interstellaren Schiffes „Endeavor“ geboren wurde, wuchs [PAWN_nameDef] damit auf, durch die engen Korridore und riesigen Frachthalts des Schiffes zu navigieren. [PAWN_pronoun] lernte, salt mechanische Probleme zu beheben, indem er die Besatzung beobachtete, aber die Ausbildung von [PAWN_possessive] in anderen Bereichen war bestenfalls lückenhaft und stützte sich auf Bordterminals und alle Datentafeln, die [PAWN_possessive] in die Hände bekommen konnte.
LanguageData.VBE_StarshipScamp.title: Raumschiff-Scamp
LanguageData.VBE_StorytellersKin.baseDesc: Als Verwandter des Geschichtenerzählers des Stammes lernte [PAWN_nameDef] die uralt Geschichten und Legenden auswendig und verstand die Moral und die Lehren in jeder Geschichte. [PAWN_pronoun] konnte jedes Publikum mit [PAWN_possessive] Worten fesseln, aber [PAWN_pronoun] hatte Probleme mit den praktischen Fähigkeiten des Jagens und Bastelns und fand mehr Trost in Geschichten als in Werkzeugen.
LanguageData.VBE_StorytellersKin.title: Verwandte des Geschichtenerzählers
LanguageData.VBE_SupplyCoordinator.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] war von entscheidender Bedeutung für die Verwaltung der Logistik- und Lieferketten der Kolonie und sorgte für einen effizienten Waren- und Materialfluss. [PAWN_pronoun] war gut organisiert, aber nicht besonders praxisorientiert und verzichtete auf direkte Betreuungsaufgaben und qualifizierte Handarbeit.
LanguageData.VBE_SupplyCoordinator.title: Versorgungskoordinator
LanguageData.VBE_WarOrphan.baseDesc: Der Krieg hat [PAWN_nameDef] alles genommen: Familie, Zuhause und Unschuld. In der Folgezeit fand [PAWN_pronoun] Trost in den Seiten von Büchern und lernte in der sicheren Bibliothek eines Flüchtlingslagers etwas über die Welt. Während [PAWN_pronoun] einen ausgeprägten Intellekt entwickelte, hatte [PAWN_pronoun] mit körperlichen Aufgaben und sozialer Interaktion zu kämpfen.
LanguageData.VBE_WarOrphan.title: Kriegswaise
LanguageData.VBE_YoungAstronomer.baseDesc: [PAWN_pronoun] war schon in jungen Jahren von den Sternen fasziniert. Das Leben auf einem Raumschiff verschaffte [PAWN_objective] eine einzigartige Perspektive auf den Kosmos. [PAWN_pronoun] verbrachte Nächte damit, Sternenkarten zu kartieren und von fernen Galaxien zu träumen. Diese Besessenheit ließ jedoch wenig Raum für praktische Fähigkeiten oder soziale Kontakte.
LanguageData.VBE_YoungAstronomer.title: Junger Astronom
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttlePilot.description: Als geborener Pilot hat [PAWN_nameDef] Shuttles und andere Fluggeräte unter den gefährlichsten Bedingungen geflogen, die man sich vorstellen kann. [PAWN_pronoun] ist unerschütterlich, hat schon viel erlebt und ist immer bereit, in einer Kneipenschlägerei mitzumachen – oder sich mit Raufbalten und Hochglanzstars gleichermaßen zu treffen.
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttlePilot.title: Shuttle-Pilot
LanguageData.AM_ChemicalPlantIntern.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ist Praktikant in einer Chemiefabrik und hat die Aufgabe, mit bestimmten chemischen Arbeitsstoffen umzugehen und die Bedienung der Fabrikausrüstung zu erlernen. [PAWN_pronoun] lernt schnell und hilft gelegentlich Arbeitern bei der Behandlung von Verletzungen, die sie sich während der Arbeit zugezogen haben.[PAWN_pronoun] zeichnet in seiner Freizeit auch gerne.
LanguageData.AM_ChemicalPlantIntern.title: Praktikant in einer Chemiefabrik
LanguageData.AM_DisasterOrphans.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lost [PAWN_possessive] parents in the insect infestation and lived alone in an underground network of caves. [PAWN_pronoun] often went hungry until one day [PAWN_pronoun] discovered the back door of a geheim laboratory warehouse. [PAWN_pronoun] broke in and stole the food inside, but was caught on [PAWN_possessive] second attempt.
LanguageData.AM_DisasterOrphans.title: Katastrophenwaisen
LanguageData.AM_FailedExperimentalSubjects.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] hat bei einem Unfall in einer Chemiefabrik eine große Menge giftiger Gase eingeatmet. Der Zwillingsbruder von [PAWN_possessive] schickte [PAWN_pronoun] in das der Chemiefabrik angeschlossene Krankenhaus, um [PAWN_pronoun] zu retten, aber das Krankenhaus behandelte [PAWN_nameDef] nicht. Stattdessen logen sie der Familie [PAWN_possessive] vor, dass [PAWN_pronoun] gestorben sei, und benutzten [PAWN_nameDef] als Versuchsperson in einem Parasitenexperiment. Dieses gescheiterte Experiment hat den Verstand von [PAWN_possessive] zerstört.
LanguageData.AM_FailedExperimentalSubjects.title: gescheiterte Fächer
LanguageData.AM_FashionGuy.description: After being injured,[PAWN_nameDef] was no longer able to continue [PAWN_pronoun] career as an athlete. Disappointed, [PAWN_pronoun] was hired as a security guard by a Einkaufszentrum. This fashionable guy liked to patrol the Einkaufszentrum at night in his classic black striped sportswear and use a machine gun to knock out every sneaky thief.
LanguageData.AM_FashionGuy.title: Modetyp
LanguageData.AM_FormerAthlete.description: [PAWN_nameDef] war ein ehemaliger Sportler. [PAWN_pronoun] hatte vor seiner Verletzung mehrere Sportmeisterschaften gewonnen.[PAWN_pronoun] hatte einen Zwillingsbruder, der in seiner Jugend in einer Chemiefabrik zu arbeiten begann, aber seitdem nichts mehr von ihm gehört hat.
LanguageData.AM_FormerAthlete.title: ehemaliger Sportler
LanguageData.AM_LaboratoryKid.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was conceived in a test tube in a geheim laboratory, where every child underwent military-style education and was frequently administered drugs. There, [PAWN_nameDef] acquired a great deal of knowledge.
LanguageData.AM_LaboratoryKid.title: Laborkind
LanguageData.AM_ResearchersChild.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s father was a researcher at an uralt laboratory, with an unnatural fondness for experimentation. Consequently, [PAWN_nameDef] was frequently administered unauthorized drugs, inflicting severe pain upon [PAWN_nameDef].
LanguageData.AM_ResearchersChild.title: Kind des Forschers
LanguageData.AM_RisingStar.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a rising star in the military academy with excellent physical fitness and combat skills, which led to [PAWN_pronoun] being kidnapped and sent to a geheim laboratory, where a clone was sent to [PAWN_possessive] family as a substitute.
LanguageData.AM_RisingStar.title: aufsteigender Stern der Militärakademie
LanguageData.AM_RunawayChild.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde häufig von [PAWN_possessive] Eltern misshandelt, was dazu führte, dass [PAWN_pronoun] in einem Wutanfall das Haus verließ. Tragischerweise wurde [PAWN_pronoun] bald von Einzelpersonen entführt und in ein geheimes Labor gebracht.
LanguageData.AM_RunawayChild.title: entlaufenes Kind
LanguageData.AM_SpecialUnits.description: Nach einem speziellen „einvernehmlichen“ Parasitenexperiment wurde [PAWN_nameDef] erweitert und als einzigartige Einheit ausgewiesen, die häufig verdeckte Missionen durchführt.
LanguageData.AM_SpecialUnits.title: Spezialeinheiten
LanguageData.VQE_AncientEngineer01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] war Teil eines Teams, das versuchte, uralt ARC-Komponenten zurückzuentwickeln. Die Geheimnisse hinter den komplizierten Designs der Maschine faszinierten [PAWN_objective]. Obwohl ein Großteil der Technologie unverständlich war, hat [PAWN_pronoun] einige wichtige Teile erfolgreich für den modernen Gebrauch adaptiert.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientEngineer01.title: uralt Ingenieur
LanguageData.VQE_ControlSystemsEngineer03.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde mit der Modernisierung der Steuerungssysteme von ARC-Reaktoren beauftragt. Während [PAWN_pronoun] neue Sicherheitsprotokolle integrierte, blieben viele der Kernfunktionen eine Black Box. Dennoch gelang es [PAWN_pronoun], die Effizienz durch die Anpassung der uralt-Algorithmen zu steigern.
LanguageData.VQE_ControlSystemsEngineer03.title: Ingenieur für Steuerungssysteme
LanguageData.VQE_FieldRepairTech04.description: [PAWN_nameDef] hat Jahre damit verbracht, beschädigte ARC-Einheiten in abgelegenen Kolonien zu reparieren. Obwohl [PAWN_pronoun] nicht über die ursprünglichen Schaltpläne verfügte, war er geschickt darin, Korrekturen zu improvisieren. Es war ein gefährlich-Job, aber [PAWN_pronoun] hatte für alle Fälle immer ein paar Ersatz-ARC-Komponenten dabei.
LanguageData.VQE_FieldRepairTech04.title: Feldreparaturtechnik
LanguageData.VQE_PowerArchitect02.description: [PAWN_nameDef] hat sich auf die Optimierung des Leistungsflusses innerhalb von ARC-Systemen spezialisiert. Durch die sorgfältige Kalibrierung der Brennstäbe konnte [PAWN_pronoun] die Betriebszeit des Reaktors erheblich verlängern. Trotz fehlender umfassender Kenntnisse der uralt-Mechanismen wurden die Anpassungen von [PAWN_nameDef] zum Industriestandard.
LanguageData.VQE_PowerArchitect02.title: Machtarchitekt
LanguageData.VQE_SafetyInspector05.description: Als Sicherheitsinspektor reiste [PAWN_nameDef] zwischen den Kolonien und überprüfte den Status der ARC-Reaktoren. Obwohl [PAWN_pronoun] nur über die Funktionsweise der Kernsysteme spekulieren konnte, war [PAWN_pronoun] in der Lage, mögliche Ausfälle zu identifizieren und Wartungsmaßnahmen vorzuschlagen, die die Lebensdauer des Reaktors verlängerten.
LanguageData.VQE_SafetyInspector05.title: ARC-Sicherheitsinspektor
LanguageData.VQE_ChildhoodInventorGenetron.descriptio: Als Kind gab sich [PAWN_nameDef] nie mit Spielzeug oder einfachen Vergnügungen zufrieden. [PAWN_pronoun] hatte Freude daran, alt Maschinen und Schrott aus dem Schrottplatz der Kolonie zu zerlegen. Während die anderen Kinder spielten, steckte [PAWN_nameDef] bis zu den Ellenbogen in einem kaputten Generator oder einer nicht mehr funktionierenden Bergbaudrohne und versuchte zu verstehen, was sie antreibt. Die Erwachsenen empfanden dies oft als störend, insbesondere wenn [PAWN_pronoun] sich die notwendige Ausrüstung für Experimente „auslieh“. Doch wer genauer hinsah, erkannte einen Funken Genialität.
LanguageData.VQE_ChildhoodInventorGenetron.title: neugieriger Bastler
LanguageData.VQE_InventorGenetronAdulthood.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde unter Ingenieuren zu einer Legende als Erfinder des ARC, eines bahnbrechenden Stromgenerators, der das Schicksal ganzer Kolonien veränderte. Angetrieben von dem unermüdlichen Wunsch, die Energieknappheit zu beheben, die den äußeren Rand lähmt, hat [PAWN_pronoun] die Grenzen des sicheren Experimentierens verschoben. Die ersten Prototypen wurden überstürzt hergestellt, was zu tragischen Unfällen führte, die viele Todesopfer forderten. Obwohl diese Misserfolge eine schwere Belastung für [PAWN_objective] darstellten, bestärkten sie [PAWN_possessive] in seiner Entschlossenheit. Nach unzähligen Prüfungen war [PAWN_nameDef] schließlich erfolgreich und festigte das Erbe von [PAWN_possessive] als Held für einige und als rücksichtsloser Außenseiter für andere.
LanguageData.VQE_InventorGenetronAdulthood.title: Erfinder des ARC
LanguageData.VFEM_Archer22.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was trained to fight in the lord’s army as an archer, spending countless hours practicing [PAWN_possessive] aim. [PAWN_pronoun] became an expert at firing arrows accurately and quickly, even under pressure. However, [PAWN_pronoun] lacked experience with close combat, often relying on others to protect [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.VFEM_Archer22.title: archer
LanguageData.VFEM_Baker14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] rose early each morning to knead dough and bake bread for the village. Over the years, [PAWN_pronoun] developed a knack for crafting perfect loaves and managing a hot oven. However, the repetitive nature of the work left [PAWN_pronoun] uninterested in other trades or studies.
LanguageData.VFEM_Baker14.title: baker
LanguageData.VFEM_Bandit48.description: [PAWN_nameDef] roamed the countryside with a band of outlaws, ambushing travelers and raiding villages. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled in both melee combat and intimidation but earned a reputation as a gefährlich outlaw. Life on the run hardened [PAWN_pronoun] and left [PAWN_pronoun] distrusting of others.
LanguageData.VFEM_Bandit48.title: Bandit
LanguageData.VFEM_Beggar31.description: [PAWN_nameDef] survived by begging on the streets, relying on the charity of others for food and shelter. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at reading people’s moods and persuading them to give, but the harsh life left [PAWN_pronoun] weak and unskilled in manual labor.
LanguageData.VFEM_Beggar31.title: beggar
LanguageData.VFEM_Blacksmith37.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in the forge, shaping metal into tools, weapons, and armor. [PAWN_pronoun] earned the admiration of the village for [PAWN_possessive] skill and reliability. The constant heat and heavy labor left [PAWN_pronoun] strong and focused, though not particularly well-read.
LanguageData.VFEM_Blacksmith37.title: blacksmith
LanguageData.VFEM_Brickmaker10.description: [PAWN_nameDef] shaped and fired clay bricks for construction projects in [PAWN_possessive] village. The intense labor strengthened [PAWN_possessive] body and gave [PAWN_pronoun] a keen understanding of construction techniques. Years of working near hot kilns left [PAWN_pronoun] with little stamina for long days of physical labor.
LanguageData.VFEM_Brickmaker10.title: brickmaker
LanguageData.VFEM_Butler45.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served the lord and [PAWN_possessive] family directly, ensuring their needs were met with promptness and discretion. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled in etiquette and managing a househalt staff. The role gave [PAWN_pronoun] a sharp eye for detail but little patience for physical labor.
LanguageData.VFEM_Butler45.title: butler
LanguageData.VFEM_CampFollower28.description: [PAWN_nameDef] traveled with armies, maintaining the camp and preparing supplies. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled in basic survival and cooking, ensuring the saltiers were fed and ready for battle. Despite living near combat, [PAWN_pronoun] rarely saw direct action and focused on support roles.
LanguageData.VFEM_CampFollower28.title: camp follower
LanguageData.VFEM_CandleMaker08.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years crafting candles from tallow and wax, supplying light to the nearby village. The work required patience and precision, which [PAWN_pronoun] excelled at. However, the repetitive nature of the trade left [PAWN_pronoun] uninterested in more creative pursuits.
LanguageData.VFEM_CandleMaker08.title: candle maker
LanguageData.VFEM_Carpenter40.description: [PAWN_nameDef] crafted furniture, tools, and wooden structures for the village. [PAWN_pronoun] earned [PAWN_possessive] living through precision and skill, shaping timber into practical and beautiful creations. Though [PAWN_pronoun] excelled at [PAWN_possessive] trade, [PAWN_pronoun] had little time for intellectual pursuits.
LanguageData.VFEM_Carpenter40.title: carpenter
LanguageData.VFEM_Chamberlain42.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the keep’s living quarters, overseeing servants and ensuring the lord’s chambers were well-kept. [PAWN_pronoun] became adept at organizing and managing resources but often found [PAWN_possessive]self caught in the politics of the househalt. The role demanded both precision and tact.
LanguageData.VFEM_Chamberlain42.title: chamberlain
LanguageData.VFEM_Cooper15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] crafted barrels and casks for the village, using simple tools to shape and assemble wooden staves. The work required precision and patience, skills that [PAWN_pronoun] mastered over years. Despite [PAWN_possessive] expertise, [PAWN_pronoun] rarely ventured beyond the workshop to socialize or pursue other interests.
LanguageData.VFEM_Cooper15.title: cooper
LanguageData.VFEM_Counterfeiter50.description: [PAWN_nameDef] forged coins and documents, deceiving merchants and nobles alike. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at crafting convincing replicas, though [PAWN_pronoun] avoided physical labor whenever possible. The constant risk of exposure forced [PAWN_pronoun] to move frequently, never staying in one place for long.
LanguageData.VFEM_Counterfeiter50.title: counterfeiter
LanguageData.VFEM_Fence47.description: [PAWN_nameDef] traded in stolen goods, turning ill-gotten items into coin while avoiding the attention of the authorities. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at bargaining and gauging the value of items but avoided direct involvement in theft. The constant deception made [PAWN_pronoun] adept at reading people’s motives.
LanguageData.VFEM_Fence47.title: fence
LanguageData.VFEM_FieldHand02.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a laborer in the fields from a young age, planting crops and harvesting under the watchful eye of overseers. [PAWN_pronoun] grew strong from hauling sacks of grain and learned the basics of caring for plants. However, the grueling work left little time for other pursuits, and [PAWN_pronoun] never learned to read or write.
LanguageData.VFEM_FieldHand02.title: field hand
LanguageData.VFEM_Fisher04.description: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living catching fish from the rivers and lakes near [PAWN_possessive] village. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to craft simple nets and traps but spent most of [PAWN_possessive] time alone on the water. The repetitive work left [PAWN_pronoun] skilled but uninterested in other tasks.
LanguageData.VFEM_Fisher04.title: fisher
LanguageData.VFEM_Footman21.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a foot saltier in the local lord's army, marching into battle with sword and shield. The brutal skirmishes taught [PAWN_pronoun] the value of endurance and discipline. Years of combat left [PAWN_pronoun] skilled with melee weapons but untrained in ranged combat.
LanguageData.VFEM_Footman21.title: footman
LanguageData.VFEM_Gravedigger13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] nights digging graves for the dead and maintaining the village cemetery. The work was somber and lonely, but it made [PAWN_pronoun] strong and capable of handling heavy tools. Constant exposure to death left [PAWN_pronoun] emotionally detached from others.
LanguageData.VFEM_Gravedigger13.title: gravedigger
LanguageData.VFEM_Healer39.description: [PAWN_nameDef] tended to the sick and wounded, applying [PAWN_possessive] knowledge of medicine and herbal remedies. [PAWN_pronoun] gained respect for [PAWN_possessive] ability to save lives, though [PAWN_pronoun] often had to face the harsh reality of those [PAWN_pronoun] couldn’t save. The villagers relied on [PAWN_objective] as their primary source of care.
LanguageData.VFEM_Healer39.title: healer
LanguageData.VFEM_Herbalist36.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived near the edge of the forest, gathering plants to craft medicines and salves for the village. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a keen understanding of nature and its uses but often kept to [PAWN_possessive]self to focus on [PAWN_possessive] craft. Villagers respected [PAWN_possessive] knowledge, seeking [PAWN_possessive] help in times of need.
LanguageData.VFEM_Herbalist36.title: herbalist
LanguageData.VFEM_KitchenServant41.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked long hours in the keep's kitchens, preparing food for the nobles and their guests. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to cook large meals with limited resources, honing [PAWN_possessive] culinary skills. Though the work was exhausting, [PAWN_pronoun] found pride in [PAWN_possessive] ability to feed others.
LanguageData.VFEM_KitchenServant41.title: kitchen servant
LanguageData.VFEM_Mason38.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a skilled mason, shaping stone into sturdy walls and magnificent buildings. [PAWN_pronoun] earned a good reputation for [PAWN_possessive] precision and creativity in construction. [PAWN_pronoun] rarely participated in farming or hunting, focusing solely on [PAWN_possessive] craft.
LanguageData.VFEM_Mason38.title: mason
LanguageData.VFEM_Mercenary29.description: [PAWN_nameDef] salt [PAWN_possessive] sword to the highest bidder, fighting in skirmishes across the land. Years of battle left [PAWN_pronoun] hardened and skilled in melee combat, but [PAWN_pronoun] never trusted anyone enough to form lasting bonds. [PAWN_pronoun] carried scars from both physical and emotional wounds.
LanguageData.VFEM_Mercenary29.title: mercenary
LanguageData.VFEM_Miller12.description: [PAWN_nameDef] operated a village mill, grinding grain into flour for the community. The job required an understanding of machinery and a steady hand to keep the mill running smoothly. Years of verstaubt work left [PAWN_pronoun] prone to coughing fits and other ailments.
LanguageData.VFEM_Miller12.title: miller
LanguageData.VFEM_MudDigger20.description: [PAWN_nameDef] dug clay from riverbanks for pottery and construction projects in the village. The exhausting labor left [PAWN_pronoun] with a strong back and thick arms but little interest in intellectual endeavors. [PAWN_pronoun] rarely interacted with others, spending most days knee-deep in mud.
LanguageData.VFEM_MudDigger20.title: mud digger
LanguageData.VFEM_Outlaw33.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived outside the law, surviving through theft and violence. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at fighting and evading capture, but [PAWN_pronoun] was shunned by society and relied on [PAWN_possessive] wits to stay alive. The life of an outlaw left [PAWN_pronoun] hardened and distrusting of others.
LanguageData.VFEM_Outlaw33.title: verbieten
LanguageData.VFEM_Pickpocket46.description: [PAWN_nameDef] survived by slipping through crowded markets, deftly lifting coins and trinkets from unsuspecting villagers. [PAWN_pronoun] developed nimble fingers and a keen sense for spotting opportunities, but [PAWN_pronoun] always lived in fear of being caught. Years of petty theft left [PAWN_pronoun] mistrustful and geheimive.
LanguageData.VFEM_Pickpocket46.title: pickpocket
LanguageData.VFEM_Pikeman26.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stood in tightly packed lines, wielding a long pike to defend against charging cavalry. The work was grueling and required coordination with [PAWN_possessive] comrades to form an impenetrable wall of steel. While [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in formation combat, [PAWN_pronoun] struggled with tasks requiring individual creativity.
LanguageData.VFEM_Pikeman26.title: pikeman
LanguageData.VFEM_Poacher32.description: [PAWN_nameDef] hunted illegally in the lord’s forests, risking [PAWN_possessive] life to feed [PAWN_possessive] family. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled with a bow and learned to move silently through the woods, but [PAWN_pronoun] always lived in fear of being caught by the lord’s men.
LanguageData.VFEM_Poacher32.title: poacher
LanguageData.VFEM_RatCatcher19.description: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living ridding the village of vermin, setting traps and chasing down rats with [PAWN_possessive] bare hands. The work was Einkaufszentrum and filthy, but it honed [PAWN_possessive] reflexes and taught [PAWN_pronoun] the ways of sEinkaufszentrum creatures. Years in dark cellars left [PAWN_pronoun] socially awkward.
LanguageData.VFEM_RatCatcher19.title: rat catcher
LanguageData.VFEM_Scavenger34.description: [PAWN_nameDef] survived by scavenging abandoned battlefields and Ruineeed villages, gathering anything of value. [PAWN_pronoun] became adept at spotting useful items and avoiding danger, but the life left [PAWN_pronoun] with little sense of cleanliness or order.
LanguageData.VFEM_Scavenger34.title: Aasfresser
LanguageData.VFEM_Scullion43.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] days washing dishes and scrubbing pots in the keep’s kitchens. The work was dirty and thankless, but it gave [PAWN_pronoun] a strong work ethic and the ability to endure long hours of labor. [PAWN_pronoun] rarely interacted with anyone outside the kitchen staff.
LanguageData.VFEM_Scullion43.title: scullion
LanguageData.VFEM_Shepherd06.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] days tending sheep in the hills surrounding [PAWN_possessive] village. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at managing livestock and defending the flock from predators. The quiet life made [PAWN_pronoun] thoughtful but left [PAWN_pronoun] unprepared for more physically demanding work.
LanguageData.VFEM_Shepherd06.title: shepherd
LanguageData.VFEM_Shieldbearer27.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was tasked with carrying a large shield into battle, protecting [PAWN_possessive] comrades from incoming projectiles. The position required endurance and discipline, as [PAWN_pronoun] stood firm even under heavy fire. The role left [PAWN_pronoun] with little opportunity to practice ranged combat.
LanguageData.VFEM_Shieldbearer27.title: shieldbearer
LanguageData.VFEM_SiegeEngineer30.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked with a team to build and operate siege engines during castle assaults. The role demanded ingenuity and strength, as [PAWN_pronoun] helped design, construct, and fire massive weapons. While skilled in engineering, [PAWN_pronoun] struggled with close-quarters combat.
LanguageData.VFEM_SiegeEngineer30.title: siege engineer
LanguageData.VFEM_Smuggler49.description: [PAWN_nameDef] transported contraband across borders, using [PAWN_possessive] knowledge of verborgen paths and bribes to avoid detection. [PAWN_pronoun] became adept at navigating and negotiating under pressure, though the constant risk of capture took a toll on [PAWN_possessive] nerves. The life of secrecy made [PAWN_pronoun] wary of strangers.
LanguageData.VFEM_Smuggler49.title: smuggler
LanguageData.VFEM_Spearman25.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was trained to halt the front line with a spear, using reach to keep enemies at bay. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to work in formation with others, relying on coordination and timing to fend off cavalry charges. Years of combat hardened [PAWN_pronoun], though [PAWN_pronoun] lacked skill in crafting or more delicate tasks.
LanguageData.VFEM_Spearman25.title: spearman
LanguageData.VFEM_Squire23.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a squire to a local knight, learning the ways of battle and assisting [PAWN_objective] master. [PAWN_pronoun] gained skill with weapons and armor, though most of [PAWN_possessive] duties involved maintenance and carrying supplies. The experience made [PAWN_pronoun] strong and disciplined but left little time for independent thought.
LanguageData.VFEM_Squire23.title: squire
LanguageData.VFEM_Stablehand16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] days mucking stalls and tending to horses in the village stables. Over time, [PAWN_pronoun] developed a deep understanding of animal care and a steady hand for calming even the most skittish creatures. The hard labor left [PAWN_pronoun] with little time for intellectual pursuits.
LanguageData.VFEM_Stablehand16.title: stablehand
LanguageData.VFEM_StableServant44.description: [PAWN_nameDef] tended to the lord’s horses, feeding and grooming them and cleaning their stalls. [PAWN_pronoun] gained a deep understanding of animal care and built strong muscles from the physical labor. The isolation of the stables left [PAWN_pronoun] with limited social skills.
LanguageData.VFEM_StableServant44.title: stable servant
LanguageData.VFEM_StoneHauler05.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in a stone quarry, hauling heavy blocks to Baustelles. The endless labor left [PAWN_pronoun] with great strength but little patience for intellectual pursuits. The hard life in the quarry also sharpened [PAWN_possessive] instincts for survival.
LanguageData.VFEM_StoneHauler05.title: stone hauler
LanguageData.VFEM_Tanner07.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in a tannery, turning raw hides into leather for clothing and armor. The job was messy and unpleasant, but it gave [PAWN_pronoun] an eye for detail and strong hands. Years of exposure to harsh chemicals left [PAWN_pronoun] with poor health.
LanguageData.VFEM_Tanner07.title: tanner
LanguageData.VFEM_Thatcher17.description: [PAWN_nameDef] repaired and constructed thatched roofs for the village. The work demanded both skill and endurance, as [PAWN_pronoun] balanced on rooftops for hours. Years of labor made [PAWN_pronoun] strong and precise, but [PAWN_pronoun] rarely pursued creative endeavors.
LanguageData.VFEM_Thatcher17.title: thatcher
LanguageData.VFEM_Vagabond35.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wandered from village to village, taking odd jobs and sleeping wherever [PAWN_pronoun] could find shelter. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to survive on little and became skilled at adapting to new situations, but [PAWN_pronoun] never stayed in one place long enough to form meaningful relationships.
LanguageData.VFEM_Vagabond35.title: vagabond
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageBrewer18.description: [PAWN_nameDef] brewed ale for the village, perfecting recipes passed down through generations. The brewing process taught [PAWN_pronoun] patience and attention to detail, as each batch required careful timing and temperature control. [PAWN_pronoun] spent so much time brewing that [PAWN_pronoun] neglected physical training.
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageBrewer18.title: village brewer
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageCook09.description: [PAWN_nameDef] prepared meals for the local villagers, using simple ingredients to make hearty stews and breads. [PAWN_pronoun] honed [PAWN_possessive] skills over countless fires and learned to stretch resources in times of scarcity. The kitchen, however, left no time for intellectual or artistic pursuits.
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageCook09.title: village cook
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageHunter01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a sEinkaufszentrum village and spent [PAWN_possessive] days hunting game to provide food for the community. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at tracking and setting traps but rarely interacted with others, preferring the solitude of the forest. Over time, [PAWN_pronoun] gained a reputation as a reliable provider, though [PAWN_possessive] social skills remained underdeveloped.

LanguageData.VFEM_PrizeArcher169.title: prize archer

LanguageData.VFEM_ShadowedOutcast161.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was feared by the villagers for reasons whispered but never explained. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] childhood in the shadows, avoiding those who glared or crossed themselves at [PAWN_possessive] presence. The isolation hardened [PAWN_objective], leaving [PAWN_pronoun] mistrustful and quiet, always watching from the dark corners.
LanguageData.VFEM_ShadowedOutcast161.title: shadowed outcast
LanguageData.VFEM_ShieldCarrier152.description: [PAWN_nameDef] trained alongside warriors, serving as a shield carrier during skirmishes and drills. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to endure long marches and protect [PAWN_possessive] mentors in the heat of battle. LanguageData.VFEM_ShieldCarrier152.title: shield carrier
LanguageData.VFEM_Squire151.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was apprenticed to a knight, tasked with maintaining armor, tending horses, and learning the code of chivalry. [PAWN_pronoun] spent countless hours observing battles and practicing with training weapons. The rigorous training instilled discipline and a desire to prove [PAWN_possessive] worth on the battlefield.
LanguageData.VFEM_Squire151.title: squire
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageCurseBearer164.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was believed to be cursed, blamed for every ill fortune that befell the village. Crops failed, livestock died, and villagers fell ill, all under [PAWN_possessive] dark shadow. [PAWN_pronoun] grew to expect rejection, developing a calt resilience to survive in a world that feared [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageCurseBearer164.title: village curse-bearer
LanguageData.VFEM_WhisperedFoundling165.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was discovered as an infant at the edge of the woods, wrapped in tattered cloth and left in the rain. The villagers took [PAWN_objective] in reluctantly, always murmuring of unnatural origins. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up in the shadow of suspicion, learning to remain unseen and unheard.
LanguageData.VFEM_WhisperedFoundling165.title: whispered foundling
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungArchitect168.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed an innovative irrigation system for the family estate at just ten years alt, greatly increasing crop yields. [PAWN_pronoun] impressed both the stewards and laborers with [PAWN_possessive] ingenuity. The success ensured [PAWN_pronoun] would be taken seriously, even at such a young age.
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungArchitect168.title: young architect
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungDiplomat166.description: [PAWN_nameDef] surprised [PAWN_possessive] elders by brokering a truce between feuding noble families at just twelve years alt. [PAWN_pronoun] used charm and logic to persuade both sides, earning respect far beyond [PAWN_possessive] years. The experience cemented [PAWN_possessive] place as a rising star in courtly politics.
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungDiplomat166.title: young diplomat
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungScholar143.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was tutored in history, philosophy, and mathematics from an early age, as was expected of highborn children. [PAWN_pronoun] showed a natural curiosity and an aptitude for learning, earning praise from [PAWN_possessive] tutors. Though well-read, [PAWN_pronoun] had little experience with manual or practical work.
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungScholar143.title: young scholar
LanguageData.VQE_ChildhoodLegendaryBlacksmith.descrip: Born beneath the towering chimneys of the Grand Forge, [PAWN_nameDef] grew up with fire and steel as [PAWN_possessive] only companions. While others played, [PAWN_pronoun] watched the master smiths shape metal into weapons of legend. By the time [PAWN_pronoun] could walk, [PAWN_pronoun] had learned the weight of a hammer. By the time [PAWN_pronoun] could read, [PAWN_pronoun] had memorized the blueprints of masterwork armor. Elders whispered that [PAWN_nameDef] was destined to craft wonders beyond imagination, a future shaped by the ringing of steel on anvil.
LanguageData.VQE_ChildhoodLegendaryBlacksmith.title: child of the forge
LanguageData.VQE_LegendaryBlacksmithAdulthood.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] was the last of [PAWN_possessive] kind, the final master of an art lost to time. In a world where steel had become obsolete, [PAWN_pronoun] forged weapons that could cut through plasteel and armor that could withstand railgun fire. Every strike of [PAWN_possessive] hammer wrote history in tempered alloys, cryptofused plating, and weapons that defied physics itself. But when [PAWN_possessive] ship fell, the forges cooled and the Ruinees of the craft faded into legend. Now, wandering among the Ruinees of [PAWN_possessive] past, [PAWN_pronoun] carries the weight of a lost age, the guilt of being the last one.
LanguageData.VQE_LegendaryBlacksmithAdulthood.title: legendary blacksmith
LanguageData.VQE_AshStrategist40.description: [PAWN_nameDef] formulated long-term battle plans relying on the deployment of expendable, undead battalions into irradiated and cursed zones. [PAWN_pronoun] viewed humans as inefficient vessels, preferring dust-born constructs who didn’t sleep or retreat. [PAWN_pronoun] once approved a maneuver where only the dead returned and called it a flawless victory.
LanguageData.VQE_AshStrategist40.title: ash strategist
LanguageData.VQE_AshTranslator15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] analyzed the patterns left in deadlife dust as it settled, fractals of intent, echoing through silence. [PAWN_pronoun] claimed the dust was speaking, and spent hours tracing messages only [PAWN_pronoun] could see. The others stopped questioning it when [PAWN_pronoun] predicted a breach twelve hours before it happened.
LanguageData.VQE_AshTranslator15.title: ash translator
LanguageData.VQE_BreachVolunteer46.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stepped forward during the first breach trials, signing a form titled "Consent to Dissolution." [PAWN_pronoun] was marched into the dust storm without armor, carrying only a black flag. Days later, the flag returned, stitched into [PAWN_possessive] new uniform.
LanguageData.VQE_BreachVolunteer46.title: breach volunteer
LanguageData.VQE_ComplianceAuditor30.description: [PAWN_nameDef] reviewed personnel logs, behavioral reports, and incident transcripts, flagging deviations for reconditioning. [PAWN_pronoun] never met the people [PAWN_pronoun] condemned. Only once did [PAWN_pronoun] hesitate - when the file bore [PAWN_possessive] own name.
LanguageData.VQE_ComplianceAuditor30.title: compliance auditor
LanguageData.VQE_CompliantHusk10.description: [PAWN_nameDef] volunteered for cognitive stripping, which included the removal of memory, name, and will. What remained was a body that obeyed. [PAWN_pronoun] stood in formation while storms raged and flesh fell from bone, waiting only for the next command pulse from the central stack.
LanguageData.VQE_CompliantHusk10.title: compliant husk
LanguageData.VQE_CorridorWatch25.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was posted in a hallway that no one walked down, outside a door that no one opened. [PAWN_pronoun] was talt to stand still, never speak, and never blink too long. On the seventh year, [PAWN_pronoun] started to hear footsteps behind the wall.
LanguageData.VQE_CorridorWatch25.title: corridor watch
LanguageData.VQE_CrateNotator32.description: [PAWN_nameDef] scrawled codes onto crates, noting date, contents, and threat tier. Many containers arrived unmarked, but [PAWN_pronoun] learned quickly: if it rattled, it was best to skip the contents line. Sometimes the ink bled upward, off the label, and into [PAWN_possessive] sleeve.
LanguageData.VQE_CrateNotator32.title: crate notator
LanguageData.VQE_DockGunner19.description: [PAWN_nameDef] manned the auto-cannons near the dust transfer docks, defending against "anomalous discharge movement", whatever that meant. Nothing ever approached the dock, but [PAWN_pronoun] fired anyway. Better that than let the dust think [PAWN_pronoun] hesitated.
LanguageData.VQE_DockGunner19.title: dock gunner
LanguageData.VQE_DoctrineScribe27.description: [PAWN_nameDef] transcribed the daily decrees of the central authority, etching them onto rusted tablets distributed throughout the facility. [PAWN_pronoun] wrote in total silence, copying phrases [PAWN_pronoun] did not understand. One phrase, however, appeared in every order: "Decay is compliance."
LanguageData.VQE_DoctrineScribe27.title: doctrine scribe
LanguageData.VQE_DoorTechnician14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] operated the containment pylons and extraction rigs around the Death Door. [PAWN_pronoun] calibrated siphons by eye and rebalanced psychic insulators mid-flow. The margin for error was one breath, and [PAWN_pronoun] hasn’t taken a full one since.
LanguageData.VQE_DoorTechnician14.title: door technician
LanguageData.VQE_DustCourier12.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ferried containers of deadlife dust from the extraction chamber to calt-vault containment zones. Escorts were forbidden, as too much movement stirred the dust. [PAWN_pronoun] walked in silence, clutching steel boxes that sometimes wept from within.
LanguageData.VQE_DustCourier12.title: dust courier
LanguageData.VQE_DustDoctrineArchitect36.description: [PAWN_nameDef] authored the central philosophy behind the use of deadlife dust, an ideology blending utility, inevitability, and transcendence through decay. [PAWN_pronoun] designed the program not to conquer death, but to industrialize it. Those who dissented were reassigned to dust-harvesting duties until compliant.
LanguageData.VQE_DustDoctrineArchitect36.title: dust doctrine architect
LanguageData.VQE_DustLoader16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for loading raw deadlife dust into containment drums, working under flashing hazard lights and sealed hoods. The powder stuck to gloves and skin no matter how thick the gear. [PAWN_pronoun] was talt it couldn't penetrate bone, but [PAWN_pronoun] isn’t sure anymore.
LanguageData.VQE_DustLoader16.title: dust loader
LanguageData.VQE_DustRegistrar26.description: [PAWN_nameDef] catalogued every gram of deadlife dust processed through the sector, logging each shipment’s origin and intended experiment. [PAWN_pronoun] never asked what the dust did, just that the weights matched and the signatures were clean. Some days, the logbook filled itself.
LanguageData.VQE_DustRegistrar26.title: dust registrar
LanguageData.VQE_EchoRepeater45.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was exposed to the Death Door during a containment breach and hasn't spoken [PAWN_possessive] own thoughts since. Everything [PAWN_pronoun] says is a repetition of something someone else is about to say. [PAWN_pronoun] knows things that haven’t happened yet. The facility keeps [PAWN_objective] alive... just in case.
LanguageData.VQE_EchoRepeater45.title: echo repeater
LanguageData.VQE_EternalLogisticsOfficer38.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] designed the warehouse and storage rotation protocol meant to function without human oversight for over a thousand years. [PAWN_pronoun] believed a perfect system outlived its masters, and had [PAWN_possessive] own heart replaced with a synthetic failsafe. [PAWN_pronoun] has not aged since activation.
LanguageData.VQE_EternalLogisticsOfficer38.title: eternal logistics officer
LanguageData.VQE_FilterMechanic20.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the dust filtration systems that kept the air breathable and the death sealed. The filters clogged fast, screaming if left too long. [PAWN_pronoun] replaced them by hand, gloved, double-suited, and breathing recycled air laced with static.
LanguageData.VQE_FilterMechanic20.title: filter mechanic
LanguageData.VQE_FoglineObserver8.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was deployed alone into chemically saturated deadzones, tasked with recording troop decay rates and atmospheric effects. [PAWN_pronoun] watched comrades dissolve, regenerate, and march again, then noted the results with unblinking precision. [PAWN_pronoun] didn’t speak for years afterward, and no one asked [PAWN_objective] to.
LanguageData.VQE_FoglineObserver8.title: fogline observer
LanguageData.VQE_GatewaySentinel13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] guarded the perimeter of the Death Door facility, tasked with eliminating anything that emerged or tried to return. [PAWN_pronoun] saw shapes that didn’t reflect light, and heard commands that weren’t broadcast. The dust drifted past the line sometimes, and [PAWN_pronoun] learned not to breathe too deep.
LanguageData.VQE_GatewaySentinel13.title: gateway sentinel
LanguageData.VQE_IndoctrinatedRevenant5.description: [PAWN_nameDef] died in the field and was immediately reanimated under Directive Pale Flame: an experimental loop-binding protocol to override memory, identity, and morality. [PAWN_pronoun] still wears the scars of [PAWN_possessive] first death, though they’ve long ceased to matter. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] kills with the calm of someone who’s already passed judgment.
LanguageData.VQE_IndoctrinatedRevenant5.title: indoctrinated revenant
LanguageData.VQE_IntakeMonitor18.description: [PAWN_nameDef] watched the flow of deadlife dust into containment silos, reporting clogs and pressure drops with precise timing. [PAWN_pronoun] wasn’t allowed to speak to other staff as too many went missing between shifts. The job required focus and silence, which [PAWN_pronoun] delivered perfectly.
LanguageData.VQE_IntakeMonitor18.title: intake monitor
LanguageData.VQE_LabelOverseer34.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was in charge of verifying label integrity across the sealed vault grid. [PAWN_pronoun] spent entire shifts reading faded text under flickering lights, checking against catalogs no longer maintained. Some crates had no labels, just symbols that [PAWN_pronoun] could swear [PAWN_pronoun] remembered from dreams.
LanguageData.VQE_LabelOverseer34.title: label overseer
LanguageData.VQE_MealDistributor24.description: [PAWN_nameDef] handed out ration packs to workers exiting the sealed extraction halls. The meals were identical, grey, tasteless, pre-labeled. Sometimes one would whisper when opened. [PAWN_pronoun] never took one for [PAWN_objective]self, just in case.
LanguageData.VQE_MealDistributor24.title: meal distributor
LanguageData.VQE_Necroengineer3.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was both saltier and scientist, one of the few entrusted to maintain the resurrection architecture embedded in elite corpses. [PAWN_pronoun] spliced code into spinal columns and rewrote death like it was faulty circuitry. Despite the grotesque procedures, [PAWN_pronoun] never hesitated, as progress demanded flesh.
LanguageData.VQE_Necroengineer3.title: necroengineer
LanguageData.VQE_NullInfantry7.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was among the first inducted into the Null Corps: frontline troops chemically lobotomized to erase fear and memory. [PAWN_pronoun] received orders through skull-implanted transceivers, moving silently and without question. [PAWN_pronoun] does not remember pain, or why [PAWN_pronoun] enlisted. Only the rifle in [PAWN_possessive] hands.
LanguageData.VQE_NullInfantry7.title: null infantry
LanguageData.VQE_NullWitness44.description: No records exist for [PAWN_nameDef] prior to Vault Cycle 18. [PAWN_pronoun] was found kneeling at the Death Door, eyes closed, hands outstretched, murmuring patterns that canceled sound in a six-meter radius. [PAWN_pronoun] now works in Inventory. The lights dim when [PAWN_pronoun] passes.
LanguageData.VQE_NullWitness44.title: null witness
LanguageData.VQE_NutritionSynthesist29.description: [PAWN_nameDef] formulated nutrient slurries for long-term storage in deep dormancy wings. [PAWN_pronoun] was talt not to question the smell, or why some vats emptied without record. [PAWN_pronoun] just stirred, sealed, and labeled each batch: “For Contingency Use Only.”
LanguageData.VQE_NutritionSynthesist29.title: nutrition synthesist
LanguageData.VQE_ObediencePledge48.description: [PAWN_nameDef] signed the Oath of Obedience in blood, requesting permanent reassignment to non-cognitive labor. [PAWN_pronoun] underwent cerebral smoothing, then was sent to carry crates too heavy for the living. [PAWN_pronoun] does not stop until ordered to, even if bones crack.
LanguageData.VQE_ObediencePledge48.title: obedience pledge
LanguageData.VQE_OssuaryGuard9.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was stationed in the ossuaries: vast chambers where failed saltiers were stacked and catalogued for parts. [PAWN_pronoun] patrolled in silence, rifle in hand, surrounded by the rattling echoes of half-living experiments. No one spoke in the ossuaries. No one had mouths.
LanguageData.VQE_OssuaryGuard9.title: ossuary guard
LanguageData.VQE_PaleWitness43.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stood guard outside the inner chamber for 900 days, never entering, never relieved. Then, on day 901, the door opened just a slit. [PAWN_pronoun] looked inside for exactly three seconds. Since then, [PAWN_pronoun] has not blinked once.
LanguageData.VQE_PaleWitness43.title: pale witness
LanguageData.VQE_PreservedCommander4.description: [PAWN_nameDef] rose to command a death battalion before being sealed in cryostorage with [PAWN_possessive] mind uploaded to carbon-thin neural plates. Decades passed in blackout stasis, dreaming only of tactical formations and absolute obedience. When awakened, [PAWN_pronoun] resumed command as if the war had never paused.
LanguageData.VQE_PreservedCommander4.title: preserved commander
LanguageData.VQE_ProcessedSentinel50.description: [PAWN_nameDef] requested the “watcher’s gift” - a surgical splice of deadlife dust into the optic nerves and frontal cortex. [PAWN_pronoun] stands motionless for days, monitoring movement where none exists. [PAWN_pronoun] hasn’t reported an intrusion, but occasionally whispers that one is "already inside."
LanguageData.VQE_ProcessedSentinel50.title: processed sentinel
LanguageData.VQE_PrototypeSubject1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] volunteered for the first wave of transhuman necrosis trials, offering [PAWN_possessive] body to a military doctrine that worshipped permanence through decay. [PAWN_pronoun] endured months in a sealed vat as bone, tissue, and cognition were rewired by machine and fluid alike. What emerged was no longer fully alive, but unshakably loyal.
LanguageData.VQE_PrototypeSubject1.title: prototype subject
LanguageData.VQE_ReanimationWarden39.description: [PAWN_nameDef] oversaw the barracks of the reanimated units, managing deployment cycles and overseeing mental degradation threshalts. [PAWN_pronoun] insisted the undead required no names, only barcodes. When one subject regained a memory and spoke, [PAWN_pronoun] personally incinerated it.
LanguageData.VQE_ReanimationWarden39.title: reanimation warden
LanguageData.VQE_ReturnedObserver42.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was sent through the Death Door for a three-minute reconnaissance. The cameras failed instantly. [PAWN_pronoun] returned eighteen hours later, unharmed but altered, with skin calter, voice slower, eyes not entirely [PAWN_possessive]. No one asked what [PAWN_pronoun] saw. No one does now.
LanguageData.VQE_ReturnedObserver42.title: returned observer
LanguageData.VQE_RitualSubject47.description: [PAWN_nameDef] knelt willingly in the circle, surrounded by augurs and dark machines, and did not scream when the dust was poured into [PAWN_possessive] lungs. [PAWN_pronoun] was declared clinically dead, then reassigned to frontline duty two hours later. [PAWN_pronoun] no longer blinks. Nor stops.
LanguageData.VQE_RitualSubject47.title: ritual subject
LanguageData.VQE_ShiftRecorder23.description: [PAWN_nameDef] logged every shift rotation, personnel movement, and anomaly ping near the Death Door. [PAWN_pronoun] noticed strange patterns in the logs: repeating names, people clocking in after confirmed deaths, whole hours missing. [PAWN_pronoun] kept recording anyway.
LanguageData.VQE_ShiftRecorder23.title: shift recorder
LanguageData.VQE_SilenceOfficer21.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enforced silence protocol within the dust-processing halls, where sound was said to attract unwanted responses. [PAWN_pronoun] walked the catwalks with a shock-rod and a clicker, punishing speech, coughs and even breath, if too loud. [PAWN_pronoun] hasn’t spoken in years, even off duty.
LanguageData.VQE_SilenceOfficer21.title: silence officer
LanguageData.VQE_SilentConversion49.description: [PAWN_nameDef] walked into the conversion chamber, sealed the door behind [PAWN_objective], and waited. The machine inside removed [PAWN_possessive] speech, hunger, and memory. What emerged walked straight to duty assignment without waiting for instruction.
LanguageData.VQE_SilentConversion49.title: silent conversion
LanguageData.VQE_SpecimenHandler28.description: [PAWN_nameDef] moved biological containers between crypto-labs, some twitching, some whispering. [PAWN_pronoun] never opened a crate, but sometimes the shadows inside moved with familiarity. [PAWN_pronoun] didn’t log what didn’t stop moving.
LanguageData.VQE_SpecimenHandler28.title: specimen handler
LanguageData.VQE_StockpileRotator33.description: [PAWN_nameDef] moved uralt supplies through decaying aisles, rotating materials to slow entropy. Many of the items had no known purpose, some no discernible shape. [PAWN_pronoun] once touched something warm that shouldn’t have been. It didn’t cool down afterward.
LanguageData.VQE_StockpileRotator33.title: stockpile rotator
LanguageData.VQE_ThresholdHarvester11.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stood closest to the Death Door, siphoning dust from its breathless aperture into sealed black vials. The dust hissed, shimmered, and whispered, burning the air and minds alike. [PAWN_pronoun] wore triple-layered filtration gear, but still wakes to coughing shadows.
LanguageData.VQE_ThresholdHarvester11.title: threshalt harvester
LanguageData.VQE_TrenchAwakener6.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to burial patrols, recovering fallen comrades and tagging them for reanimation. [PAWN_pronoun] slept among corpses, carried bone-thin bodies back to processing, and watched them twitch to life again. The stench never faded, but neither did [PAWN_possessive] unwavering obedience.
LanguageData.VQE_TrenchAwakener6.title: trench awakener
LanguageData.VQE_UniformInspector22.description: [PAWN_nameDef] checked for dust contamination in uniforms and skin before workers left the core sectors. [PAWN_pronoun] scrubbed patches that pulsed, burned fabric that moved, and blacklisted anything that remembered touch. [PAWN_pronoun] stopped questioning why some suits came back... without the wearers.
LanguageData.VQE_UniformInspector22.title: uniform inspector
LanguageData.VQE_VaultArchivist31.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained ledgers of inventory buried deep in the sub-storage vaults. [PAWN_pronoun] documented sealed containers with unreadable glyphs and crates that hummed faintly when touched. One morning, an entry appeared in [PAWN_possessive] own handwriting, describing a box [PAWN_pronoun] hadn’t logged yet.
LanguageData.VQE_VaultArchivist31.title: vault archivist
LanguageData.VQE_VaultCommissar37.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ensured ideological purity among vault personnel, conducting loyalty evaluations and sanctioning disciplinary corrections. [PAWN_pronoun] maintained that those exposed to the Death Door too long became unreliable. [PAWN_pronoun] had many of them sealed behind the vaults, alive or not was irrelevant.
LanguageData.VQE_VaultCommissar37.title: vault commissar
LanguageData.VQE_VaultEnforcer2.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was stationed deep beneath the surface, tasked with protecting the bio-vaults that housed experimental regeneration tanks and failed prototypes. When containment alarms sounded, [PAWN_pronoun] didn’t flinch. The only thing [PAWN_pronoun] feared was failure, and fear had been surgically removed years ago.
LanguageData.VQE_VaultEnforcer2.title: vault enforcer
LanguageData.VQE_VaultEntryClerk35.description: [PAWN_nameDef] verified access credentials for vault entrants and logged removals from sealed shelves. [PAWN_pronoun] noticed that names on the log began to repeat: dead saltiers requesting supplies long after they’d been archived. [PAWN_pronoun] flagged it once. Nothing changed.
LanguageData.VQE_VaultEntryClerk35.title: vault entry clerk
LanguageData.VQE_VaultScrubber17.description: [PAWN_nameDef] cleaned the insides of sealed dust vaults after they were purged. The walls were never truly clean, they were always humming, always whispering. [PAWN_pronoun] stopped using [PAWN_possessive] name after the third cycle. No one corrected [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.VQE_VaultScrubber17.title: vault scrubber
LanguageData.VQE_WhisperHost41.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to monitor the auditory pulses emitted by the Death Door during lunar shifts. [PAWN_pronoun] began transcribing messages in no known language, yet perfectly understood. After the seventh day, [PAWN_pronoun] no longer required equipment to hear them.
LanguageData.VQE_WhisperHost41.title: whisper host
LanguageData.VQE_Childhood_OfficersShadow.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up behind reinforced glass, just beyond the war room where [PAWN_possessive] parent issued silent commands to a dying world. The halls were sterile, the uniforms always grey, and [PAWN_pronoun] quickly learned which doors never opened and which ones never closed. [PAWN_pronoun] was talt the flickering silhouettes beyond the viewing screens were simulations, until one of them looked back. No one mentioned it afterward, and neither did [PAWN_pronoun].
LanguageData.VQE_Childhood_OfficersShadow.title: officer’s shadow
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneral.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed Operation: Deadlife from the first blueprint to the last breath, believing death could be structured, harnessed, and weaponized. When the Death Door was first opened, [PAWN_pronoun] stepped through without hesitation, alone, unarmed, and smiling. [PAWN_pronoun] returned days later, silent and burned from within, wrapped in binding cloth and sealed inside a containment sarcophagus that no one claimed to understand. The war ended. The door remained open. [PAWN_pronoun] sleeps still - but the seals are growing warm.
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneral.title: the general
LanguageData.VQE_ArchiteVolunteer1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] nahm an einem geheim Militärprogramm teil, das Ruhm und Stärke versprach. Die Experimente machten [PAWN_objective] härter als die meisten anderen, aber die Behandlungen beeinträchtigten die Feinmotorik und Stabilität von [PAWN_possessive].
LanguageData.VQE_ArchiteVolunteer1.title: Freiwilliger Architekt
LanguageData.VQE_BetrayalStudy21.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde zu Experimenten gezwungen, bei denen Probanden als enge Gefährten gepaart wurden, nur um dann dazu verleitet zu werden, sich gegenseitig zu verraten, um zu überleben. Die Grausamkeit zerstörte die Fähigkeit von [PAWN_possessive] zu vertrauen, schärfte aber [PAWN_possessive] Instinkt für Gefahren.
LanguageData.VQE_BetrayalStudy21.title: Verratsstudie
LanguageData.VQE_BoneReforged6.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde einem brutalen Prozess unterzogen, bei dem jeder Knochen im Körper von [PAWN_possessive] zerbrochen, ersetzt und mit verstärkten Transplantaten wieder aufgebaut wurde. Der Prozess machte [PAWN_objective] nahezu unzerbrechlich, aber die ständige Qual hinterließ bei [PAWN_possessive] für immer Narben im Geist.
LanguageData.VQE_BoneReforged6.title: Knochen neu geschmiedet
LanguageData.VQE_BrainProbed8.description: [PAWN_nameDef] war Teil eines schrecklichen Programms, bei dem Archit-Knoten direkt in das Gehirn von [PAWN_possessive] gebohrt wurden. Die Verfahren steigerten die Reflexe und das Erinnerungsvermögen, aber häufige Ohnmachtsanfälle und eindringliche Visionen plagen [PAWN_objective] immer noch.
LanguageData.VQE_BrainProbed8.title: Gehirn untersucht
LanguageData.VQE_CombatDrills15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] musste harte Kampfübungen absolvieren, um die Belastbarkeit von saltiers unter Beschuss zu testen. Das brutale Regime schärfte die Instinkte von [PAWN_possessive], hinterließ aber bei [PAWN_objective] bleibende Verletzungen und ein tiefes Misstrauen gegenüber der Autorität.
LanguageData.VQE_CombatDrills15.title: Gegenstand einer Kampfübung
LanguageData.VQE_CompassionPunished24.description: [PAWN_nameDef] erlebte Prüfungen, in denen das Zeigen von Freundlichkeit eine Bestrafung bedeutete, während Grausamkeit belohnt wurde. Mit der Zeit lernte [PAWN_pronoun], Mitgefühl hinter einer Maske des Gehorsams zu verbergen, obwohl der Instinkt der Fürsorge nie ganz verschwand.
LanguageData.VQE_CompassionPunished24.title: Mitgefühl bestraft
LanguageData.VQE_DeceptionStudy16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde in ein Programm aufgenommen, das Lügen belohnte und Ehrlichkeit bestrafte. Mit der Zeit wurde [PAWN_pronoun] zwar besser darin, Menschen zu verstehen, aber es fiel ihm schwer, echte Verbindungen aufzubauen.
LanguageData.VQE_DeceptionStudy16.title: Täuschungsstudie
LanguageData.VQE_EnhancedSoldier5.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde Teil eines Militärprogramms zur Schaffung von Supersaltiers durch Archit-Injektionen. Die Verfahren stärkten [PAWN_objective] für den Kampf, aber die ständigen Modifikationen trübten das Selbstbewusstsein von [PAWN_possessive] und ließen [PAWN_objective] vom normalen Leben los.
LanguageData.VQE_EnhancedSoldier5.title: erweiterte saltier
LanguageData.VQE_EyeReplaced10.description: Bei [PAWN_nameDef] wurden beide Augen entfernt und durch instabile experimentelle Verstärkungen ersetzt, die dazu gedacht sind, Ziele in der Dunkelheit zu verfolgen. Die Implantate verbesserten das Zielen von [PAWN_possessive], machten [PAWN_objective] jedoch lichtempfindlich und für immer auf seltsame visuelle Überlagerungen angewiesen.
LanguageData.VQE_EyeReplaced10.title: Auge ersetzt
LanguageData.VQE_FalseFamily22.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde in simulierten Häusern untergebracht, wobei Fremde als Verwandte fungierten, nur um sie ohne Erklärung verschwinden zu lassen. Dieser Zyklus wiederholte sich, bis [PAWN_pronoun] überhaupt keine Bindungen mehr bildete und stattdessen durch calt Ablösung überlebte.
LanguageData.VQE_FalseFamily22.title: falsche Familie
LanguageData.VQE_GeneFighter3.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde für ein militärisches Experiment ausgewählt und erfuhr erzwungene genetische Veränderungen, um stärkere saltiers zu schaffen. Das Projekt verschaffte [PAWN_objective] einen Vorteil im Kampf, aber die ständigen Tests ließen wenig Zeit für Ausbildung oder zivile Fertigkeiten.
LanguageData.VQE_GeneFighter3.title: Genkämpfer
LanguageData.VQE_GroupConflict17.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde mit anderen Probanden in Räumen eingesperrt, während Forscher Ressourcen manipulierten, um Konflikte zu erzwingen. Die ständigen Kämpfe schärften [PAWN_possessive] Überlebensinstinkte, aber Vertrauen wurde unmöglich.
LanguageData.VQE_GroupConflict17.title: Konfliktthema
LanguageData.VQE_IsolationChamber14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde monatelang allein in einer stillen, lichtlosen Zelle festgehalten, während Forscher die Auswirkungen von Sinnesentzug untersuchten. Die Tortur hinterließ [PAWN_objective] distanziert und zurückgezogen, aber seltsam konzentriert, wenn er alleine arbeitete.
LanguageData.VQE_IsolationChamber14.title: Isolationskammer
LanguageData.VQE_IsolationTest19.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde in falsche soziale Situationen gezwungen, in denen Verbündete plötzlich verschwanden oder sie verrieten. Die sich ändernden Regeln machten [PAWN_objective] paranoid, waren sich aber der Details, die andere übersehen, sehr bewusst.
LanguageData.VQE_IsolationTest19.title: Isolationstest
LanguageData.VQE_LossExperiment20.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde dazu gebracht, Bindungen zu seinen Untertanen zu knüpfen, nur um dann mit ansehen zu müssen, wie sie ihm immer wieder weggenommen wurden. Die Trauer hinterließ Narben, verlieh [PAWN_objective] aber auch eine ungewöhnliche Widerstandsfähigkeit gegenüber Verzweiflung.
LanguageData.VQE_LossExperiment20.title: Verlustexperiment
LanguageData.VQE_MilitaryExperiment4.description: [PAWN_nameDef] meldete sich freiwillig zu geheimen Experimenten, da er glaubte, dass es die Pflicht von [PAWN_possessive] sei. Das Ergebnis waren verbesserte Reflexe und stärkere Muskeln – allerdings auf Kosten chronischer Schmerzen und Jähzorn.
LanguageData.VQE_MilitaryExperiment4.title: militärisches Experiment
LanguageData.VQE_MuscleStitched9.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ertrug endlose Zyklen der Muskelentfernung und des erzwungenen Nachwachsens, die jedes Mal zu dichteren Konfigurationen zusammengefügt wurden. Das Ergebnis war eine enorme Kraft, aber der Körper von [PAWN_possessive] bleibt grotesk uneben und schmerzt ständig unter der Belastung.
LanguageData.VQE_MuscleStitched9.title: Muskel genäht
LanguageData.VQE_ObedienceTrial18.description: [PAWN_nameDef] verbrachte Jahre in einem Programm, das die Grenzen des Gehorsams gegenüber Autoritäten testen sollte. Das Befolgen von Befehlen wurde zur zweiten Natur, aber [PAWN_objective] lernte nie, Entscheidungen für [PAWN_objective]selbst zu treffen.
LanguageData.VQE_ObedienceTrial18.title: Gehorsamsprozess
LanguageData.VQE_PainTolerance13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] musste endlose Prozeduren über sich ergehen lassen, die darauf abzielten, die Grenzen der menschlichen Schmerztoleranz zu überschreiten. Obwohl die Qual, die [PAWN_objective] zurückließ, noch schlimmer wurde, konnte [PAWN_pronoun] das Vertrauen von [PAWN_possessive] in andere nie wirklich wiedererlangen.
LanguageData.VQE_PainTolerance13.title: Schmerztoleranzversuch
LanguageData.VQE_SilenceStudy25.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde in erzwungenem Schweigen erzogen und dafür bestraft, dass er gesprochen oder sogar Lärm gemacht hatte. Die Isolation ließ [PAWN_objective] in Gruppen fast stumm zurück, gab [PAWN_possessive] jedoch eine unheimliche Konzentration, wenn er alleine arbeitete.
LanguageData.VQE_SilenceStudy25.title: Stillestudie
LanguageData.VQE_SkinGrafted7.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde wiederholt einer Hautabschuppung und einer regenerativen Transplantation unterzogen, um schnell heilende Seren zu testen. Die Experimente machten [PAWN_objective] verletzungsresistent, schwächten aber auch den Tastsinn von [PAWN_possessive] und ließen den Körper von [PAWN_possessive] mit Narben übersät.
LanguageData.VQE_SkinGrafted7.title: Haut transplantiert
LanguageData.VQE_StarvationTrial23.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ertrug Experimente, bei denen Essen zurückgehalten wurde und die Rationen absichtlich ungleichmäßig waren, was die Probanden dazu zwang, um Essensreste zu betteln oder zu kämpfen. Der Hunger hat tiefe Narben in den Geist von [PAWN_possessive] hinterlassen und [PAWN_objective] unruhig und misstrauisch gegenüber Großzügigkeit gemacht.
LanguageData.VQE_StarvationTrial23.title: Hungerprozess
LanguageData.VQE_StressTest11.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde wochenlang unter kontrollierten Bedingungen eingesperrt, ohne Schlaf und überlastet mit sensorischen Eingaben, um die Ausdauer zu messen. Die Tests raubten [PAWN_possessive] die Nerven und ließen [PAWN_objective] nervös, aber seltsam stressresistent zurück.
LanguageData.VQE_StressTest11.title: Stresstest-Proband
LanguageData.VQE_ToxicExposure12.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde im Rahmen eines militärischen Widerstandsprogramms in mit giftigen Dämpfen gefüllten Kammern eingesperrt. Die Erfahrung vernarbte [PAWN_possessive] die Lunge und verbrannte [PAWN_possessive] Haut, aber [PAWN_pronoun] lernte, Krankheit und Schmerz zu überwinden.
LanguageData.VQE_ToxicExposure12.title: toxische Exposition
LanguageData.VQE_TrialSubject2.description: [PAWN_nameDef] hat [PAWN_possessive]-Rechte für die Chance abgegeben, einer experimentellen Einheit beizutreten. Endlose Injektionen und Training machten [PAWN_objective] widerstandsfähig, aber die ständige Beobachtung und Eingrenzung ließen [PAWN_objective] ängstlich und zurückgezogen zurück.
LanguageData.VQE_TrialSubject2.title: Versuchsgegenstand
LanguageData.VQE_IdealPatient.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde für unzählige experimentelle Verfahren mit Architekturtechnologie ausgewählt. Aus unbekannten Gründen lehnte [PAWN_pronoun] nie ein Implantat ab, was [PAWN_objective] zum perfekten Subjekt für radikale genetische Experimente machte. Die Behandlungen machten [PAWN_objective] körperlich gebrechlich, aber an Schmerzen angepasst und ungewöhnlich tolerant gegenüber Strapazen. Leider führte eine der Behandlungen zu einer langsam fortschreitenden, unheilbaren Krankheit.
LanguageData.VQE_IdealPatient.title: idealer Patient
LanguageData.VQE_KidnappedChild.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wurde in jungen Jahren entführt und in Gefangenschaft aufgezogen. Da er keine angemessene Schulbildung erhielt, überlebte [PAWN_pronoun], indem er lernte, zuzuhören, zu gehorchen und die Stimmungen der [PAWN_possessive] Entführer zu erkennen. Die Erfahrung führte dazu, dass [PAWN_objective] anderen gegenüber misstrauisch und in den meisten praktischen Fähigkeiten ungeübt war, aber ungewöhnlich sensibel gegenüber den Absichten der Menschen.
LanguageData.VQE_KidnappedChild.title: entführtes Kind
